mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_posts kp WHERE kp.parent_id IS NULL
AND (kp.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR kp.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT kp.id, kp.title, kp.content, kp.branch_name, kp.view_count, kp.depth, kp.root_id, kp.parent_id, kp.created_at, kp.updated_at, u.nickname, u.username, u.id AS user_id FROM knowledge_posts kp JOIN users u ON kp.user_id = u.id WHERE kp.id = #{id}

SELECT kp.id, kp.title, kp.content, kp.branch_name, kp.view_count, kp.depth, kp.root_id, kp.parent_id, kp.created_at, kp.updated_at, u.nickname, u.username, u.id AS user_id FROM knowledge_posts kp JOIN users u ON kp.user_id = u.id WHERE kp.root_id = #{rootId} AND kp.parent_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY kp.depth ASC, kp.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_posts ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'PK', title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '제목', content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '내용 (마크다운)', branch_name VARCHAR(150) NULL COMMENT '브랜치 관점 설명 (원본은 NULL)', user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '작성자 FK → users.id', parent_id BIGINT NULL COMMENT '부모 글 ID (NULL=원본)', root_id BIGINT NULL COMMENT '원본 글 ID', depth INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '브랜치 깊이 (0=원본)', view_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '조회수', created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '작성일시', updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '수정일시', CONSTRAINT fk_kp_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ) COMMENT '지식나눔 게시글 테이블'
